hero.title: Smart Farming for
hero.subtitle: AI-powered pest detection, crop health scanning, weather-based advice, and smart crop planning. Everything you need to maximize yields and protect your harvest.

features.title: Smart Tools for
features.subtitle: AgriNova combines AI technology with agricultural expertise to help you make better decisions every day. Explore our powerful tools designed for your success.

pestDetection.title: AI Pest Detection
pestDetection.description: Upload photos of pests or plant damage and get instant AI identification with treatment recommendations.

weatherAdvisor.title: Weather Advisor
weatherAdvisor.description: Real-time weather data with AI-powered farming advice tailored to today's conditions.

cropPlanning.title: Crop Planning
cropPlanning.description: Schedule planting, watering, and harvest dates with smart reminders to stay on track.

cropHealthScanner.title: Crop Health Scanner
cropHealthScanner.description: Scan your crops to identify healthy, struggling, or failing sections with actionable insights.

hardwareStore.title: Hardware Store
hardwareStore.description: Browse and purchase smart farming sensors, IoT devices, and agricultural technology.

aiChatbot.title: AI Crop Chatbot
aiChatbot.description: Chat with our AI assistant anytime for instant advice on pests, diseases, irrigation, and more.

cropAdvisor.title: Personal Crop Advisor
cropAdvisor.description: Enter your crop and location to receive tailored daily guidance, from planting to harvest.

simulator.title: What-If Simulator
simulator.description: Simulate different crop scenarios for next year and see projected outcomes before committing.

harvestPredictor.title: Harvest Predictor
harvestPredictor.description: Get predictions on harvest yields, potential problems, and market trends based on global data.

marketAdvisor.title: Market Advisor
marketAdvisor.description: Get AI-powered market price estimates, demand forecasts, and profitability analysis for your crops.

about.title: Empowering Farmers Across
about.description: AgriNova was founded with a simple mission: to bring the power of artificial intelligence to smallholder farmers who feed the world. We believe every farmer deserves access to cutting-edge technology, regardless of farm size.

regions.title: Our Operating Regions
regions.description: AgriNova primarily serves farmers across Southern Asia, with specialized knowledge of local crops, climate patterns, and agricultural practices:

sdg.title: Dedicated to SDG 8: Decent Work & Economic Growth
sdg.description: AgriNova is deeply committed to the United Nations Sustainable Development Goal 8, which promotes sustained, inclusive economic growth, full employment, and decent work for all.

employment.title: Create Employment Opportunities
employment.description: Our platform empowers smallholder farmers to increase productivity by 35%, creating sustainable livelihoods and reducing rural poverty.

growth.title: Boost Economic Growth
growth.description: AI-driven market insights help farmers get 25% better prices, contributing to local and national economic development.

skills.title: Promote Skills & Innovation
skills.description: We provide training in modern agricultural techniques, bridging the digital divide and fostering entrepreneurship in rural communities.

sustainable.title: Sustainable Agriculture
sustainable.description: We prioritize eco-friendly solutions that protect both crops and the environment for future generations.

dataDriven.title: Data-Driven Decisions
dataDriven.description: Our AI analyzes real-time weather, soil, and crop data to provide actionable insights you can trust.

farmerFirst.title: Farmer-First Approach
farmerFirst.description: Built by agricultural experts, designed for real farmers, and constantly improved based on your feedback.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Founded in 2025, AgriNova emerged from a collaboration between agricultural scientists, AI researchers, and farmers who understood the challenges of modern farming.
story.p2: Our team combines decades of agricultural expertise with cutting-edge artificial intelligence to create tools that are both powerful and accessible.
story.p3: Today, AgriNova helps over 50,000 farmers make smarter decisions about their crops—from predicting pest outbreaks before they happen, to optimizing irrigation during monsoon seasons, to timing harvests for maximum market value.

chatbot.title: Crop Advisor Chat
chatbot.subtitle: AI-powered farming assistance
chatbot.greeting: Hello! I'm AgriNova's crop advisor. I can help you with questions about farming, pest control, crop health, irrigation, and more. What would you like to know today?
chatbot.q1: How do I prevent aphids on my tomatoes?
chatbot.q2: What's the best time to plant rice?
chatbot.q3: How often should I water my wheat crop?
chatbot.q4: What are signs of nitrogen deficiency?
chatbot.errorMessage: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.
